TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hbun, title = Hbun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hbun} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 180 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 116 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 64 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 62%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun hya' ga 石門水庫. tay mkyahu' na Hbun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun hya' ga Wsilung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun hya' ga Pyasan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Hbun ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 69 buwan, 180 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 116 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 64 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 62%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun hya' ga 石門水庫. tay mkyahu' na Hbun hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun hya' ga Wsilung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun hya' ga Pyasan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun ħjaʔ ɣa ****. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun ħjaʔ ɣa pjas~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
